'''Baraboo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], along the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]].<ref name="EA" /> This world was the site of the [[Institute for Sentient Studies]], which contained the most comprehensive collection of neurological models in the galaxy.<ref name="BS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref><ref name="CSWE" /> From this world came a species of [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] beings known as the [[Baraboo biomold|biomold]].<ref name="CC" />

Some [[12 ABY/Legends|12]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the cyborg [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] accessed the institute's records, searching for a clue to decipher a puzzle aboard the mysterious ghost ship called the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]''.<ref name="BS" /><ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
